emails.subject: Candidate - Todd Neugebauer
emails.body: Candidate Todd Neugebauer Barry, Thanks for the updates on the previous candidates. I am forwarding the resume of Todd Neugebauer from EBS London. Todd is a manager in the origination group who is currently searching for potential opportunities in the States. He can be reached at the numbers as listed below. Let me know if you are interested, as Todd will be in Houston next week if you would care to meet with him in person. Regards, Todd Peikert To: Peikert, Todd

emails.subject: RE: Candidate - Todd Neugebauer
emails.body: RE: Candidate Todd Neugebauer Todd, further to your voice message. Yes, I did meet in person with Robert Ayers, the meeting went well, and he was going to contact me on Friday. He was considering another offer a different co.) and wanted to make a decision this week. As such I committed to informing him as to whether or not an offer will be made to him. At this time, I am not going to make an offer and will advise him as such upon my next contact. Although he has some good qualities I am going to continue in my search. BT

emails.subject: RE: Candidate - Todd Neugebauer
emails.body: I talked to Robert Ayers, he is going to accept a job with another co. BT
